buildCommand: cd ../.. && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm --filter @workspace/frontend run build && BASE_PATH=/m15/ pnpm --filter @workspace/m15 run build && BASE_PATH=/portail/ pnpm --filter @workspace/portail run build && mkdir -p artifacts/frontend/dist/public/m15 artifacts/frontend/dist/public/portail && cp -r artifacts/m15/dist/public/. artifacts/frontend/dist/public/m15/ && cp -r artifacts/portail/dist/public/. artifacts/frontend/dist/public/portail/
